calendar_scrap.label: Calendar Scrap
calendar_scrap.description: A torn piece of March calendar. Someone circled the 17th and wrote 3:17 in the margin.

photo_set.label: Photo Backs
photo_set.description: Four wallet photos flipped over. Letters are scribbled on the cardboard backs.

receipt_stub.label: Receipt Stub
receipt_stub.description: Stillpoint Sleep Lab — intake deposit. Date matches the circled calendar day.

key_blade.label: Key Blade
key_blade.description: A narrow brass key blade without a handle.

key_handle.label: Key Handle
key_handle.description: A worn wooden key grip. It looks like it snapped off something.

assembled_key.label: Assembled Key
assembled_key.description: Blade and handle joined. It should fit the wardrobe lock.

cipher_disk.label: Cipher Disk
cipher_disk.description: A cardboard wheel with cut-out windows. Align STILL with POINT.

stillpoint_letter.label: Stillpoint Letter
stillpoint_letter.description: Folded consent letter for Project Stillpoint. Your signature is at the bottom.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: No signal. One notification frozen on screen: 'You chose to forget.'
